sentences.translation: Hodanje je veoma korisna vježba za tijelo.
sentences.translationEn: Walking is a very useful exercise for the body.

sentences.arabic: أَمْشِي فِي الْمُنْتَزَهِ كُلَّ صَبَاحٍ مَعَ صَدِيقِي.
sentences.translation: Svako jutro šetam u parku sa svojim prijateljem.
sentences.translationEn: I walk in the park every morning with my friend.

sentences.arabic: أَتَنَفَّسُ الْهَوَاءَ النَّقِيَّ وَأَشْعُرُ بِنَشَاطٍ كَبِيرٍ.
sentences.translation: Udišem svjež zrak i osjećam veliku energiju.
sentences.translationEn: I breathe fresh air and feel great energy.
